## 📝 Pull Request Summary

<!-- Briefly describe what this PR does in 1-2 sentences. -->



## 🔗 Related Issue

<!-- Link the issue this PR resolves. -->
Closes #<!-- issue number -->

## 📦 Type of Change

<!-- Check all that apply by putting an x inside the brackets: [x] -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation improvement
- [ ] 🧹 Code refactor / cleanup (no behaviour change)
- [ ] ✅ Tests added or improved
- [ ] 🔧 CI/CD or tooling change

## 🧪 How Has This Been Tested?

<!-- Describe how you tested your changes. -->
<!-- Did you run the full test suite? python manage.py test -->

- [ ] Ran `python manage.py test` locally — all tests passed
- [ ] Tested manually in the browser
- [ ] Added new tests for new/changed behaviour

## ✅ Pre-Submission Checklist

<!-- Make sure all boxes are checked before requesting review. -->

- [ ] My code follows the style of this project (PEP 8)
- [ ] I have added comments to any hard-to-understand code
- [ ] My changes don't break existing functionality
- [ ] I have updated the README if needed
- [ ] The CI pipeline passes (green checkmark on this PR)

## 📸 Screenshots (if applicable)
